meaning: adj.[医]妇科学的 妇科的
examples: This is the most commonly performed major gynaecological operation.
Not being able to talk about gynaecological matters can become a health issue.
Secondary amenorrhoea implies a gynaecological disorder or a general cause or disease.
The patent also covers use of the bacterium in ointments, creams and lotions for treating gynaecological conditions.
The same technique could eventually work for human cancers, especially those that are treated with abdominal radiation therapy such as gastrointestinal, genitourinary, and gynaecological tumours.
